data.title: Implement marker-presence in compute_dir_hash() in ticket_reducer/_cache.py
data.description: Update plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/_cache.py compute_dir_hash() (line 38) to include .archived marker presence in the hash. After hashing event files, check os.path.exists(os.path.join(ticket_dir, '.archived')) and append 'marker:present' or 'marker:absent' to hash_parts. This ensures cache invalidation when a marker is added or removed without any event file changes. Covers SC5. testing_mode: GREEN (T12 covers behavior).
